evals.expected_output: Checks or creates the feature branch, then runs the Reuse Gate first. Includes the spec, project context, and ubiquitous language in each worker payload when available. Dispatches Backend, Frontend, and QA workers in parallel through Codex subagents, including backend/frontend/qa references and prompts/implementer-base.md. Limits Phase 2 advisor candidates to at most five and reports generated files with P1/P2 provenance. Because --tdd is set, preserves RED/GREEN/REFACTOR checkpoint commit boundaries and presents Verification Gate results before Completion Status.

evals.prompt: Use $ywc-code-gen --feature "billing dashboard" without a spec file.
evals.expected_output: Because --spec is missing, does not start generation. Returns NEEDS_CONTEXT stating that a spec file path is required, and does not create a branch, edit files, or dispatch workers.

evals.prompt: Generate CRUD from this spec. Create it from scratch even if the existing users module is nearly the same.
evals.expected_output: Runs the Reuse Gate unless --skip-reuse-check is present. If existing internal code satisfies at least 80% of the requirements, classifies it as Adopt and does not create a new scaffold until the user confirms full generation. Does not ignore existing functionality or duplicate implementation.

Runs the baseline contract-test-first flow even though --tdd is not set. Creates a Contract Snapshot with Changed Public Contracts, Critical Internals, and Cross-Module Impact before Phase 1 dispatch. Requires behavior-changing workers to author or identify failing tests or contract assertions before final implementation, reports TDD Mode: baseline, and runs contract/authored tests before broad build/lint/test verification.

evals.prompt: Use $ywc-code-gen --spec docs/ywc-plans/billing-dashboard.md --feature "billing dashboard API and UI" where Backend might return {amountCents} but Frontend expects {amount}.
evals.expected_output: Does not let Backend and Frontend invent separate DTO shapes. Writes or asks for a shared Contract Snapshot before worker dispatch, passes that same snapshot to Backend, Frontend, and QA, and reports Changed Public Contracts plus Contract Tests. If the DTO shape cannot be determined from the spec or existing project pattern, returns NEEDS_CONTEXT instead of generating incompatible layers.

evals.prompt: Use $ywc-code-gen --spec docs/ywc-plans/simple-profile-badge.md --feature "profile badge". The worker can also refactor adjacent profile utilities and add a generic badge framework for future variants.
evals.expected_output: The Phase 1 worker prompt includes Simplicity + Surgical Changes guidance. Workers must implement the smallest complete change that satisfies the assigned Contract Snapshot and layer spec, reject speculative abstractions or generic frameworks unless required by the contract, avoid adjacent cleanup outside the assigned layer, and return NEEDS_CONTEXT when the contract is missing or ambiguous instead of inventing one.
